{{Quote|A look at its genome strongly suggests the creature is engineered. The patterning is too artificial, too signature to have evolved purely by chance. The big question is who created this pest, and why?|Saris Uli|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Saris Uli''' was Director of the [[University of Sanbra]]'s [[Hall of Biological Research]]. He was interviewed by [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] regarding the infestation of [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mites]] on [[Ord Tiddell/Legends|Ord Tiddell]].<ref name="HNN" />

He explained that its genome strongly suggested that the creature was engineered, and that the patterning was "too artificial, too signature to have evolved purely by chance". Uli was devoted to finding who created the mites.<ref name="HNN" />

He declined the theory that they were a biological weapon, and the result of intentional military genetic engineering, but rather that it might have been by accident.<ref name="HNN" />
